LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT SF TOWNSEND CONDOS, LLC,'S MOTION FOR ORDER OF GENERAL REFERENCE AND APPOINTMENT OF REFEREE. GRANTED. PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL TO SUBMIT BY THE CLOSE OF BUSINESS DAY 3/7/19 VIA EMAIL TO: CONTESTDEPT302TR@SFTC.ORG, A LIST OF 3 NOMINEES OF REFEREES PER CCP640.B. THE COURT WILL ISSUE AN ORDER APPOINTING A REFEREE AND A BACK UP REFEREE. DEFENDANT'S COUNSEL TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH REPEATS VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE COURT'S RULING IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312, AND SUBMIT VIA EMAIL TO CONTESTDEPT302TR@SFTC.ORG. (AS FULLY REPORTED IN THE REPORTER'S TRANSCRIPT). JUDGE: ETHAN P. SCHULMAN, CLERK: S. LE, COURT REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR#5976, SSAWYER@SFTC.ORG, REPORTED. =(302/EPS)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Of General Reference And Appointment Of Referee
Off Calendar Mar-06-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Brian M. Junginger, esq. (510-465-7100) of McInerney & Dillon, P.C. for Plaintiff/opposing party Thompson Builders Corporation FDBA West Bay.
Stephanie M. Rocha, esq. (408-292-1765) of Miller, Morton, Caillat & Nevis LLP for Defendant/Moving party SF TOWNSEND CONDOS, LLC, via Court Call.

Hearing is held (as fully reported in the reporter's notes). The Court notes that it has SF Townsend's list of 3 nominees for a referee. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT SF TOWNSEND CONDOS, LLC,'s Motion For Order Of General Reference And Appointment Of Referee.

GRANTED. Plaintiff's Counsel to submit by the close of business day 3/7/19 via email to: contestdept302tr@sftc.org, a list of 3 nominees of referees per CCP640.B. The Court will issue an order appointing a referee and a back up referee. Defendant's Counsel to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the court's ruling in compliance with CRC 3.1312, and submit via email to contestdept302tr@sftc.org. (as fully reported in the reporter's transcript).
